_meta.description: Demo example tasks. Generic, not real action items.

tasks.heading: Review INFY after Q1 print
tasks.text: INFY reports soon. Re-check operating margin trend before adding to the position.

tasks.heading: Deploy idle cash sleeve
tasks.text: Cash is above the comfort band. Stage a deploy into the index core or a debt-equiv SDI.

tasks.heading: Trim NVDA on strength
tasks.text: NVDA single-name weight rising. Consider a partial trim if it breaks the concentration cap.
